questionHtml: From the electron micrograph, suggest which viral particle P or Q is likely to have already infected a host cell.
markschemeHtml:
viral particle Q
AND
has no contents/genetic material (as it has been inserted in the host cell)  

OR  
the capsid/ envelope/protein coat is open/cut showing that its contents have been inserted into the host (cell);

meta.title: From the electron micrograph, suggest which viral particle P or Q is likely to have already infected a host cell.
breadcrumbLabels: A2.2.10. Cell types and cell structures viewed in light and electron micrographs
